scale-unlimited/declaration-strict-value.message: Design-token discipline: use a token (var(--…)) for "${property}", not the magic number "${value}". Layout spacing must use --space-*; component micro-spacing may use 6px/10px; z-index must use the --z-* ladder (bare 0/1/-1 allowed for local sibling ordering). Escapes: var(), clamp(), calc(), env(), %, em, 0, <=4px. If a raw value is genuinely needed (e.g. geometric centering), add a stylelint-disable-next-line with a reason.
